title: Pre-ticket audit: live staged reconcile on staged spine (per-step)
problem: Staged spine uses deterministic mock reconcile-scores after live OpenAlex ingest. Per-step live Ollama reconcile (if any) would be a new product-risk boundary; medium-risk milestone requires pre-ticket audit before implementation.
acceptance_criteria: Audit defines per-step live reconcile scope (rank-1 only) or documents NO-GO for live LLM reconcile.
Env gates separate from mock RGE_ALLOW_LIVE_STAGED_RECONCILE.
GO/NO-GO with hardened scope for follow-on implementation ticket if GO.
category: Phase 3 / live LLM / staged spine product-risk
